changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.[role] ( role_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), role_name NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_role PRIMARY KEY (role_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.permissions ( permission_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), permission_name NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_permissions PRIMARY KEY (permission_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.inventory ( model_number NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, display_name NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, device_id_prefix NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, decoder_logic_ids NVARCHAR(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('[]'), description NVARCHAR(500) NULL, is_active BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (1), created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), device_counter INT NOT NULL DEFAULT (0), CONSTRAINT PK_inventory PRIMARY KEY (model_number) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.payment_plan ( id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), name NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, device_quota INT NOT NULL, price_monthly DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, price_annual DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, currency NVARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('INR'), razorpay_plan_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, features NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, is_active BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (1), created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), CONSTRAINT PK_payment_plan PRIMARY KEY (id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.FeatureFlags ( flag_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), flag_name NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, display_name NVARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, description NVARCHAR(500) NULL, is_enabled BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (0), updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_by INT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_FeatureFlags PRIMARY KEY (flag_id), CONSTRAINT UQ_FeatureFlags_name UNIQUE (flag_name) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.DeviceTesting_TableConfig ( config_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), table_key VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, table_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, display_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, is_active BIT DEFAULT (1), icon_name VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT ('DocumentTextIcon'), is_exportable BIT DEFAULT (1), sort_order INT DEFAULT (0), column_config NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT (GETDATE()), created_by INT NULL, updated_at DATETIME NULL, updated_by INT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_DeviceTesting_TableConfig PRIMARY KEY (config_id), CONSTRAINT UQ_DeviceTesting_TableConfig_key UNIQUE (table_key) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.IoT_Raw_Messages ( Entry_ID BIGINT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), CreatedAt DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), Device_ID NVARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, LogicId INT NOT NULL, RawJson NVARCHAR(MAX) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_IoT_Raw_Messages PRIMARY KEY (Entry_ID) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.cloud_dashboard_hkmi ( id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), device_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, machine_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, sden VARCHAR(100) NULL, den VARCHAR(100) NULL, aen VARCHAR(100) NULL, sse VARCHAR(100) NULL, curve_number VARCHAR(100) NULL, line VARCHAR(50) NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), grease_left DECIMAL(18,4) NULL, last_service_date DATE NULL, div_rly VARCHAR(100) NULL, section VARCHAR(100) NULL, last_cof_date DATE NULL, last_cof_value DECIMAL(18,4) NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_cloud_dashboard_hkmi PRIMARY KEY (id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.client ( client_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), parent_id INT NULL, name NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, email NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, phone NVARCHAR(20) NULL, Address NVARCHAR(500) NULL, contact_person NVARCHAR(255) NULL, thinkspeak_subscription_info NVARCHAR(500) NULL, city NVARCHAR(100) NULL, state NVARCHAR(100) NULL, is_active BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (1), created_by_user_id INT NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_by_user_id INT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_client PRIMARY KEY (client_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.[user] ( user_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), client_id INT NOT NULL, first_name NVARCHAR(100) NULL, last_name NVARCHAR(100) NULL, email NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, ph_no NVARCHAR(20) NULL, password NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, user_name NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, is_active BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (1), role_id INT NOT NULL, created_by_user_id INT NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_by_user_id INT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_user PRIMARY KEY (user_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.role_permission ( role_id INT NOT NULL, permission_id INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_role_permission PRIMARY KEY (role_id, permission_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.user_preferences ( id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), user_id INT NOT NULL, client_id INT NOT NULL, preference_name NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, preference_value NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_user_preferences PRIMARY KEY (id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.client_subscription ( id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), client_id INT NOT NULL, plan_id INT NOT NULL, status NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('trialing'), razorpay_subscription_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, billing_cycle NVARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('monthly'), current_period_start DATETIME NULL, current_period_end DATETIME NULL, grace_period_end DATETIME NULL, trial_end DATETIME NULL, cancelled_at DATETIME NULL, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), CONSTRAINT PK_client_subscription PRIMARY KEY (id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.payment_transaction ( id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), client_id INT NOT NULL, subscription_id INT NULL, gateway NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, gateway_payment_id NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, currency NVARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('INR'), status NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, event_type NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, raw_payload NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), CONSTRAINT PK_payment_transaction PRIMARY KEY (id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.device ( id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), device_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, channel_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, api_key NVARCHAR(255) NULL, conversionLogic_ld NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, TransactionTableID INT NULL, TransactionTableName NVARCHAR(255) NULL, field_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, machin_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, client_id INT NULL, onboarding_date DATETIME2 NULL, ingest_endpoint NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, user_func_config NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, activation_status NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('PENDING'), mqtt_password NVARCHAR(255) NULL, mqtt_username NVARCHAR(100) NULL, device_type NVARCHAR(50) NULL, firmware_version NVARCHAR(50) NULL, mac_address NVARCHAR(50) NULL, first_seen DATETIME NULL, last_seen DATETIME NULL, activated_at DATETIME NULL, activated_by INT NULL, deactivated_at DATETIME NULL, deactivated_by INT NULL, subscription_id INT NULL, data_enabled BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (1), paused_by NVARCHAR(20) NULL, paused_at DATETIME2 NULL, paused_reason NVARCHAR(500) NULL, imei NVARCHAR(20) NULL, mqtt_password_plain NVARCHAR(100) NULL, activation_blocked_reason NVARCHAR(200) NULL, model_number NVARCHAR(50) NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_device PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT UQ_device_id UNIQUE (device_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.audit_log ( audit_id BIGINT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), user_id INT NULL, activity_type NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, action NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, message NVARCHAR(1000) NULL, target_type NVARCHAR(100) NULL, target_id INT NULL, details NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, ip_address NVARCHAR(45) NULL, user_agent NVARCHAR(500) NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), CONSTRAINT PK_audit_log PRIMARY KEY (audit_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.dashboard ( id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), name NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, display_name NVARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, description NVARCHAR(1000) NULL, client_id NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, is_active BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (1), created_by INT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), CONSTRAINT PK_dashboard PRIMARY KEY (id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.iot_data_new ( id BIGINT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), device_id INT NOT NULL, timestamp DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), sensor_type NVARCHAR(100) NULL, sensor_value DECIMAL(18,4) NULL, unit NVARCHAR(50) NULL, quality_indicator INT NULL, data_json NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), CONSTRAINT PK_iot_data_new PRIMARY KEY (id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.client_device ( id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), seller_id INT NOT NULL, buyer_id INT NOT NULL, device_id INT NOT NULL, transfer_date DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), CONSTRAINT PK_client_device PRIMARY KEY (id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.IoT_Data_Sick ( Entry_ID BIGINT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), Device_ID NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, CreatedAt DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), MessageType NVARCHAR(50) NULL, HexField NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, GSM_Signal_Strength INT NULL, Motor_ON_Time_sec INT NULL, Motor_OFF_Time_sec INT NULL, Motor_OFF_Time_min INT NULL, Number_of_Wheels_Configured INT NULL, Number_of_Wheels_Detected INT NULL, Latitude DECIMAL(10,6) NULL, Longitude DECIMAL(10,6) NULL, Fault_Code NVARCHAR(50) NULL, Motor_Current_mA INT NULL, Timestamp DATETIME2 NULL, InsertedAt DATETIME2 NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), Train_Passed BIT NULL, FaultDescriptions NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, Debug_Value BIGINT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_IoT_Data_Sick PRIMARY KEY (Entry_ID) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.IoT_Data_Sick_P3 ( Entry_ID BIGINT NOT NULL, CreatedAt DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), Device_ID NVARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, HexField NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, Event_Type INT NULL, Event_Type_Description NVARCHAR(50) NULL, Signal_Strength INT NULL, Motor_ON_Time_sec INT NULL, Motor_OFF_Time_min INT NULL, Wheel_Threshold INT NULL, IMSI NVARCHAR(20) NULL, Number_of_Wheels_Detected INT NULL, Motor_Current_Average_mA INT NULL, Motor_Current_Min_mA INT NULL, Motor_Current_Max_mA INT NULL, Battery_Voltage_mV INT NULL, Debug_Value BIGINT NULL, Timestamp DATETIME2 NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_IoT_Data_Sick_P3 PRIMARY KEY (Entry_ID) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.IoT_Data_HyPure ( Entry_ID BIGINT NOT NULL, CreatedAt DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), Device_ID NVARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, HexField NVARCHAR(500) NULL, Oil_Level BIT NULL, Limit_Switch BIT NULL, Spark BIT NULL, Motor_Trip BIT NULL, Buzzer BIT NULL, HVS BIT NULL, Motor_Reverse BIT NULL, Motor_Forward BIT NULL, Oil_Level_2 BIT NULL, Tank_Pressure BIT NULL, Motor_Trip_Fault BIT NULL, Moisture_Contamination BIT NULL, HVS_OFF BIT NULL, Change_Collector BIT NULL, Pump_Suction BIT NULL, Drain_Period_Over BIT NULL, Signal_Strength INT NULL, kV_Value INT NULL, mA_Value INT NULL, kV_Minimum INT NULL, mA_Minimum INT NULL, Temperature INT NULL, Pressure INT NULL, Motor_Runtime_Min INT NULL, Total_Runtime_Min INT NULL, Device_Runtime_Min INT NULL, Debug_Value BIGINT NULL, Timestamp DATETIME2 NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_IoT_Data_HyPure PRIMARY KEY (Entry_ID) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.SubscriptionPlans ( plan_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), name NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, description NVARCHAR(500) NULL, max_devices INT NOT NULL, price_monthly DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, price_yearly DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, grace_days INT NOT NULL DEFAULT (7), features NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, razorpay_plan_id_monthly NVARCHAR(100) NULL, razorpay_plan_id_yearly NVARCHAR(100) NULL, is_active BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (1), created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_by INT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_SubscriptionPlans PRIMARY KEY (plan_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.ClientSubscriptions ( subscription_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), client_id INT NOT NULL, plan_id INT NOT NULL, status NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('PENDING'), billing_cycle NVARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('monthly'), start_date DATETIME2 NULL, end_date DATETIME2 NULL, grace_end_date DATETIME2 NULL, razorpay_subscription_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, razorpay_customer_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, auto_renew BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (1), cancelled_at DATETIME2 NULL, cancellation_reason NVARCHAR(500) NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), created_by_user_id INT NULL, assignment_type NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('PAYMENT'), assigned_by_admin_id INT NULL, admin_notes NVARCHAR(500) NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_ClientSubscriptions PRIMARY KEY (subscription_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.PaymentTransactions ( transaction_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), subscription_id INT NOT NULL, client_id INT NOT NULL, razorpay_order_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, razorpay_payment_id NVARCHAR(100) NULL, razorpay_signature NVARCHAR(500) NULL, amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, currency NVARCHAR(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('INR'), status NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('PENDING'), payment_mode NVARCHAR(50) NULL, failure_reason NVARCHAR(500) NULL, invoice_number NVARCHAR(50) NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), CONSTRAINT PK_PaymentTransactions PRIMARY KEY (transaction_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.ClientDiscounts ( discount_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), client_id INT NOT NULL, discount_type NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, discount_value DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, is_used BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT (0), created_by INT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), applied_at DATETIME2 NULL, applied_to_order NVARCHAR(100) NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_ClientDiscounts PRIMARY KEY (discount_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.ClientTopicConfig ( config_id INT NOT NULL IDENTITY(1,1), client_id INT NOT NULL, topic_prefix NVARCHAR(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('cloudsynk'), telemetry_suffix NVARCHAR(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('telemetry'), config_suffix NVARCHAR(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT ('config'), device_type_overrides NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, created_by INT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT (GETUTCDATE()), updated_by INT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_ClientTopicConfig PRIMARY KEY (config_id), CONSTRAINT UQ_ClientTopicConfig_client UNIQUE (client_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE dbo.DeviceTelemetry ( entry_id BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (NEXT VALUE FOR dbo.telemetry_entry_id_seq), device_id NVARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, imei NVARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, logic_id INT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL, raw_payload NVARCHAR(MAX) NOT NULL, decoded_json NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_DeviceTelemetry PRIMARY KEY (entry_id) )

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IX_device_imei ON dbo.device (imei) WHERE imei IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IX_device_model_number ON dbo.device (model_number) WHERE model_number IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IX_ClientSubscriptions_end_date ON dbo.ClientSubscriptions (end_date) WHERE status IN ('ACTIVE', 'GRACE')

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IX_PaymentTransactions_razorpay_order ON dbo.PaymentTransactions (razorpay_order_id) WHERE razorpay_order_id IS NOT NULL

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IX_ClientDiscounts_unused ON dbo.ClientDiscounts (client_id) WHERE is_used = 0

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IX_DeviceTelemetry_DeviceId ON dbo.DeviceTelemetry (device_id)

changeSet.author: genvolt
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IX_DeviceTelemetry_CreatedAt ON dbo.DeviceTelemetry (created_at)
